corrections.location: Dan. IV 2, line beginning τὰ σημεῖα
corrections.note: The word ὅτι is present in the body text before ἤρεσεν.
No correction to this word itself; issue is omission of preceding ὅτι. Included only for anchoring with the phrase above.
Transcript omitted the preceding word οὕτως/οὕτω? No, image reads οὕτως ὡς? Uncertain, so not corrected.
Printed punctuation is comma, not raised dot: ἰσχυρά,
No error here; retained. Main issue on line is elsewhere.
The verb is εἶδον, not ἶδον.
The printed text lacks με after ἐφοβήθην.
A full stop follows με in the print.
A full stop follows ἔχει in the print before ᾧ εἶπα.
The apparatus uses straight apostrophe after ε, not Greek numeral mark.
The omitted article is printed as Greek ὁ, not plain ο.

corrections.current: γενεαν και γενεαν] γενεας γενεων A
corrections.correct: γενεαν και γενεαν] γενεας γενεων A |
corrections.note: A separator bar follows A before the next entry.
The apparatus prints accented ἐν.

corrections.current: θαλλων] εν θαλλω Q + επι του θρονου μου A
corrections.correct: θαλλων] ἐν θαλλω Q + ἐπι του θρονου μου A
corrections.note: The prepositions are printed with accents/breathings in the apparatus.
There is spacing between sigla; Qa is printed as Q with superscript a.
Spacing around colon differs in print.
Qa is printed with superscript a.

corrections.current: μου]+ και αι ορασεις της κεφαλης μου Q(subt lineas)
corrections.correct: μου]+ και αι ορασεις της κεφαλης μου Q (subt lineas)
corrections.note: There is a space before the parenthesis in print.
The phrase '+ εκεινο A' is present in the apparatus and omitted from the transcription.
A separator bar follows Q before the next variant.

uncertain.location: BODY Dan. IV 2 after ἐποίησε μετʼ ἐμοῦ
uncertain.note: Image clearly has ὅτι before ἤρεσεν; no further uncertainty.

notes: Body transcription contains captured marginal/page line numbers (e.g. 98, 99, 100, IV (4) 1, etc.) embedded in the text, but since they are pervasive and not actual verse text, they should be removed in a broader cleanup; not itemized exhaustively here. Main substantive body errors are omission of ὅτι, εἶδον miswritten, and extra με after ἐφοβήθην. Apparatus mostly matches, with one omitted phrase '+ εκεινο A' and minor siglum/spacing issues.
